scope: S/A external project contract inclusion only. No external project functionality is implemented.

blocked_reason_taxonomy.definition: Registry and roadmap entry only; no runtime integration is claimed.
Benchmark pattern only; it must not be treated as bundled runtime.
Adapter is planned but not implemented or ready.
Adapter or capability is explicitly post-v4.
Requires a user-configured provider boundary before runtime use.
Requires explicit user-provided secret material; no fixture may include it.
Requires network access and cannot be counted as local-ready.
Requires an external runtime that is not bundled.
Requires license review before any implementation work.
Requires security review before any implementation work.
Project identity, fit, or runtime status still needs verification.
Not part of the P1 local Workbench completion gate.
Work is reserved for post-v4 planning.
UI may display the boundary only; it must not expose execution.
Template inspiration only; not runtime functionality.
